title: garcinia cambogia var. zeylanica
intro: Garcinia cambogia var. zeylanica, also known as Ceylon Garcinia, is a variant of the Garcinia cambogia plant, which is a tropical plant native to the islands of Sri Lanka and parts of India. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its potential to inhibit the production of an enzyme called citrate lyase, which plays a key role in fat production in the body. The health benefits of Garcinia cambogia var. zeylanica include its ability to aid in weight loss, improve cholesterol levels, and regulate blood sugar levels. Garcinia cambogia var. zeylanica is typically prepared in herbal form as a capsule, tablet, or extract, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
